name: TwistedMerge: Certified Higher-Order Diagnostics and Abstention for Model Merging
summary: arXiv:2607.20887v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Model merging combines independently trained or fine-tuned models, but pairwise alignability does not imply globally consistent alignment. We formu...
description: arXiv:2607.20887v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Model merging combines independently trained or fine-tuned models, but pairwise alignability does not imply globally consistent alignment. We formulate merging as a finite descent problem in which checkpoints are local objects, alignment maps are transitions, and cycle products are residuals. TwistedMerge is a conservative certification pipeline...
author: Ting Gong, Shitan Xu
